engine-rs/crates/bridge/native-bridge/sr.justification: Native-bridge is the hand-written napi transport facade for the current generated RuntimeBridge operation set; split operation families into generated/native submodules during the next bridge-shape cleanup rather than blocking voxel-asset governance.

engine-rs/crates/bridge/runtime-bridge-a.justification: ReferenceBridge is the consolidated conformance implementation for stable RuntimeBridge operations, including the #4517 game-rule invocation harness; split operation families into focused reference modules in the next bridge-shape cleanup before raising this further.

RuntimeBridge reference tests intentionally aggregate stable operation conformance, including voxel conversion and voxel asset round-trips; split voxel asset/conversion tests into focused modules during the next bridge-shape cleanup.

engine-rs/crates/protocol/protocol-codeg.justification: Protocol-codegen still owns the hand-maintained Rust-to-TS IR registry while the R3-4 completeness/derive follow-up is pending; split generated-contract families or derive the IR before removing this exemption.

engine-rs/crates/protocol/protocol-rende.justification: Protocol-render is an older consolidated border DTO crate; split render material, texture, sprite, mesh, and diff shape families during the next protocol-surface module pass.

engine-rs/crates/services/svc-voxel-conv.justification: Voxel conversion service currently keeps registration, planning, preview, apply, diagnostics, quotas, and model-info evidence in one authority file after the native coverage hardening slices; split conversion topology, rasterization, guardrail, and readout modules in the next service-shape cleanup.
